title: Unit 8 Project — Present a Hobby
subtitle: v1 · Geodes · Choose · Research · Report · Present · Rubric · Now I Can · 13 slides

content: Find information about hobbies and interests.
Give a report on a hobby or interest.
Present your report — explain details, how you do it, and show drawings or photos.
language: Use vocabulary about hobbies to describe and explain a chosen hobby.
